feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Delivery already contained in shipment, deletion of the outbound delivery impossible
entry.content:
Dear all,

The process is following:

First we delete the freight order: FO 6100022255 duly canceled.

After that we can see in our document flow of the outbound delivery that the freight order disappears:

But if we now want delete the delivery an error message is visible:

Delivery already contained in a shipment

Cancelling is impossible

 

After saving the delivery = automatic creation of a new Freight order = 6100022305

 

How is it possible to solve this problem? We want delete the delivery. But if we delete the freight order and afterwards we save the outbound delivery, suddenly a new freight is created.

Very best regards

entry.title: Account Assignment Group to Internal Order Type
entry.content:
Hello SAP Guru,

Seeking for your kind assistance regarding my question.

Is it possible to only allow specific Internal Order Type (Capital IO) to be used by only one Account Assignment Group in a standard functionality? Or will it be subject for enhancement?

Hoping someone will help me.

Thank you so much in advance.

entry.title: How can I use Exception groups in MD07?
entry.content:
Sorry for asking very basic level questio but I can't find any reference for this MD07 - Exception Groups

* What is Exception Groups for?

* How can I use Exception Groups? (Green colored part in attached image)

* What's meaning of column? How can I use it? (Purple colored part in attached image)

* What's meaning of these items? Can anyone explain just few item? (Red colored part in attached image)

entry.title: New Plants under same company code
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

our structure now is 5 plants with 5 company codes, now we need to merge all these 5 plants under only 1 company code when we lock the old plants, we need to transfer any open document as (PO's & PR's) to the new plants but under 1 company code.

if someone has faced this experience can help me with the solution.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: MRP Type V1 and Lot Size HB
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

My requirement is to use MRP type V1 so that if the stock falls below the reorder point, the following MRP run will create the planned orders to maintain the maximum stock level. In addition, the customer's requirements are met within the Repl. lead time. So I've kept the reorder point at 1500 and the maximum stock level at 3000. My current stock is 1048. So the stock is less than the reorder point, and a scheduled order for 1952 is generated. Also, the customer's requirements should be considered. However, in my case, the customer requirement is addressed, but some customer requirements are not included in the MRP Run. Could you please help on this why certain Customer orders are not been included in the MRP Run?

entry.title: CDS for Bill of material item and dependency.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have configured variant config in SAP S4HANA Public cloud system and maintain a super BOM in which dependencies are assigned to its components. 

Ex-- we have a KMAT material (A) and its variant materials (AB, AC, AD). when we check the BOM for material-A in CS13, super BOM is displayed with lets say 20 component. But when we check BOM for material-AB, only 5 components are displayed as per dependency assignment in super BOM.

Now the requirement is to create a report for details of BOM Component for variant material (which will show BOM details of AB, AC, AD.) I have checked in public cloud system but did not found any CDS where I can find a link between dependency and BOM item.

Is there any other CDS which I can use for this purpose.

Thanks.

entry.title: SCM (SNC) - Amount of data in ADRC, ADRV & ADRU, etc. (All Adress Tables) are increasing enormously
entry.content:
Greetings SAP Experts,

In SNC, we are having performance problems because of huge amount of data content in address tables.

We have over 340 million lines in ADRC, over 1.3 billion in ADRU and also over 340 million in ADRV tables.

How can we overcome the sizing problem? Due to this problem, our delivery (ASN creation) and invoicing screens are running very slowly.

As I saw, there are several duplicate lines in these tables. We want to fix the numbers into only one vendor address. Our vendors addresses are not changing a lot but, our SNC creates a new address number in each while creation of ASN and sending the PO information into the SCM system.

Is there any way we can fix the numbers or any other way around?

Best Regards,

Mert

entry.title: PO Dates in SAP and how to utilize them
entry.content:
Is there a definition from SAP on how to use the different PO dates (PO Schedule date, Confirmation date, and Statistical Date)? 

What is the proper way to use the statistical date and should that print on the PO?

entry.title: How to reopen a closed contract in Ariba CMS
entry.content:
Hello All,

When I try to reopen a closed contract in Ariba with Amendment of type amendment and also with type republish I am getting proxy error as below. Please suggest a resolution to reopen the closed contract.

Proxy Error

The proxy server received an invalid response from an upstream server.
The proxy server could not handle the request

Reason: Error reading from remote server

entry.title: ATP is not working when MRP area is deactivated
entry.content:
Hi All,

ATP is not working in sales order when the MRP area is deactivated, which was active in the system previously.

Kindly let me know if any solution for the ATP to work without MRP area.

entry.title: kf2 value = kf1 value of previous period
entry.content:
in first period beginning inventory = initial stock 

in the subsequent periods beginning invenyory = ending inventory of previous period 

can someone help me to model this situation .

entry.title: Is is possible to do quick sum up/average by selecting specific cells in SAP IBP Planner Workspace?
entry.content:
I would like to see sum up or average value of couple of cells selected, similar to Excel functionality, so, let's say if I have 100pcs in June and 30pcs in February - by selecting two months I would like to see 130 pcs calculated and displayed on the fly, not the whole KF total. Is it possible in web interface - Planner Workspace?

Thank you!

entry.title: System does not allow posting from EWM to IM-MM if there is different inputs
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need your help for the following issue :

1) Product is batch managed

2) The system is not allowing for posting from EWM to IM-MM if there is different inputs in the Batch, but the requirement is ...it should post from EWM to IM-MM

3) With this regard, what are the pre-requisites I need to follow...Kindly help me out...

entry.title: Customer appearing in UDM_SUPERVISOR but not appearing in UDM_SPECIALIST
entry.content:
Hi,

There is one customer appearing in Supervisor worklist UDM_SUPERVISOR, but not appearing in worklist of specialist UDM_SPECIALIST, although specialist already assigned in UDM_BP. I executed transaction UDM_GENWL, but issue still exists.

Please support to find out the root cause.

Regards,

entry.title: The transaction code UDM_AUTOWRITEOFF don't close the dispute case
entry.content:
Hello together,

can you tell us, why the program don't close the dispute case?

We define the right reason code and escalation reason and save the transaction:

After the transaction, we go to the transaction code UDM_AUTOWRITEOFF and select the right data. The programm run and show this answer:

BUT, the dispute case must be close, that means, that the amount must be 0,00 EUR and the status must be "CLOSE". But the sap system don't close the dispute case and i can see the open amount and the old status.

What is the problem? I've checked also the customizing, all is fine. The G/L account and cost center is available. 

Can someone help us? Thank you so muss for the support.

Best regards,

L. E.

entry.title: Create a Blog button is Disabled. How to enable it ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am a new joiner to the SAP community group. I want to post some blogs on the SAP TM subject matter but I see that the "Create a Blog " button is disabled. Please advise how this button can be enabled.

 

Regards

Sourav Bhaumik

entry.title: Allocate products to Distribution channels by percentage not Quantity
entry.content:
Hello Dears, 
My client has a Pain point that when products are produced, representative comes first has edge to load quantity he wants with no considerations for another Reps . He needs to constrains this by SAP System but not by quantity he need it by percentage. He does not want product allocations as follows if for example he produces 1000 pcs daily 
Dist.Channel 1 : 500 PCS
Dist.Channel 2 : 300 PCS 
Dist.channel 3 : 200 PCS 

Production is not a fixed quantity daily , so he needs it to be for example: 
Dist.channel 1 : 50 % 
Dist.channel 2 : 30 % 
Dist.channel 3 : 20 % 

so does anything in SAP Standards fit this requirement ?

@

entry.title: How to show the PO document type key in the "Create Purchase Order-Advanced" App?
entry.content:
In the "Create Purchase Order Advanced" App the keys of the PO Document Types (e.G. NB) are not shown. In the GUI I see them. 

I have already activated the setting: "Display Key".

entry.title: ML81N - how to set tree off
entry.content:
Hello,

In the ML81N transaction, how can I configure the tree to always be off?

We have verified that users accessing ML81N have access to all posted service sheets, including other users.

Please, could someone tell us how we can solve this problem?

Thanks!

entry.title: planned order basic dates and production dates
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to figure out the issue happening when converting planned order to production order.
Please help us with the mechanisms of calculating the basic dates between planned order and production order.

<Situation> 
There are two planned order which basic dates are as follows:
They are same material, routing, BOM, issue quantity, float(which is 0 days), production lead time (8days)
1:Planned order A
Basic start date:9/6
Basic end date:9/9

2:Planned order B
Basic start date:9/3
Basic end date:9/6

 

When we convert them to production order, the basic dates are adjusted regarding the production lead time with backwards:
1:production order A (correct calculation)
Basic start date:8/29 (8 workdays from 9/9)
Basic end date:9/9 (Same end date as planned order)

2:Production order B (weird calculation)
Basic start date:8/27 (9 workdays from 9/6)
Basic end date:9/5 (1 day earlier than planned order)


Does anyone know why production order B have calculated 9days from the basic end dates of planned order?

we have checked following attributes;
>customized calendar, and no holidays are set during these days.
>Float are all 0 days

Thanks in advance.
